base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of oneup_text_popup — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. '1UP' green-text sprite — appears at 1-up collection or at 100-coin threshold. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: '1UP' green-text sprite — appears at 1-up collection or at 100-coin threshold; same float-up/despawn trajectory as score numbers
